acceptanceSignals: Staging load profiles meet staged phase targets.
Autoscaling converges under burst/decay without severe oscillation.
Tuning changes are committed as declarative config + benchmark evidence.

lastCommit.message: feat: implement Staged Capacity Validation and Tuning (attempt 2)

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Staged Capacity Validation and Tuning in 1 attempt

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The workspace contains the staged-capacity policy and evidence required for this feature (`CLAR-008`, `ISS-005`), retained benchmark artifacts show staged phase/split/autoscaling checks passing with no violations, and tuning is committed as declarative staging autoscaling config plus benchmark reports. Release-readiness wiring is present in load-gate/deploy evidence flow. No API-surface changes are introduced by this feature’s commits, so the OpenAPI + generated client synchronization policy is satisfied.

reinforcementResults.name: Scale Evidence Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Feature evidence is present and policy-aligned: CLAR-008 staged ramp policy is codified (`ops/observability/load/staged-capacity-policy.json`), staged load + SLO reports are generated and retained by the gate script (`scripts/check-observability-slo-baseline.sh` + `scripts/evaluate-prelaunch-load.py`), CI uploads staged artifacts (`.github/workflows/observability-slo-gate.yml`, `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`), autoscaling burst/decay convergence is captured in the staged report (`ops/observability/load/reports/staged-capacity-report.json`), and tuning is committed as declarative staging autoscaling config (`ops/kubernetes/overlays/staging/patch-autoscaling.yaml`) with release evidence traceability (`scripts/emit-release-evidence.sh`). No current-feature blockers found.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The workspace has committed, policy-aligned staged capacity validation and tuning evidence for ISS-005 with CLAR-008: declarative staged ramp/split/autoscaling policy (`ops/observability/load/staged-capacity-policy.json`), a non-placeholder passing staged benchmark report (`ops/observability/load/reports/staged-capacity-report.json`) covering ramp/burst/decay plus cache/db/queue split and convergence, tuned staging autoscaling config (`ops/kubernetes/overlays/staging/patch-autoscaling.yaml`), and release-readiness wiring in gate/deploy evidence paths (`scripts/check-observability-slo-baseline.sh`, `.github/workflows/observability-slo-gate.yml`, `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`, `scripts/emit-release-evidence.sh`). No concrete blocker owned by this feature was found.
